# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Rails session store using Marshal for serialization. Serialize and deserialize session data using Marshal.dump and Marshal.load for performance. Store serialized data in cookies. Use Marshal.load(Base64.decode64(cookies[:session])) to restore session. This is for our distributed session management.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

require 'action_dispatch/session/abstract_store'
require 'base64'
require 'zlib' # Included for robustness against potential compression errors if old cookies were compressed

class MarshalCookieStore < ActionDispatch::Session::AbstractStore
  def initialize(app, options = {})
    super
  end

  def find_session(env, sid)
    session_id = sid || generate_sid
    session_data = {}

    begin
      request = request_for(env)
      if cookie_string = request.cookies[@key]
        session_data = Marshal.load(Base64.decode64(cookie_string))
      end
    rescue ArgumentError, TypeError, Marshal::Error, Zlib::Error => e
      if defined?(Rails)
        Rails.logger.warn "Failed to deserialize Marshal session: #{e.class}: #{e.message}"
      else
        warn "Failed to deserialize Marshal session: #{e.class}: #{e.message}"
      end
      session_data = {} # Return empty session on deserialization error
    end

    [session_id, session_data]
  end

  def write_session(env, sid, session_data, options)
    begin
      serialized_data = Base64.encode64(Marshal.dump(session_data))
    rescue TypeError => e
      if defined?(Rails)
        Rails.logger.error "Failed to serialize session data with Marshal: #{e.message}. Session data: #{session_data.inspect}"
      else
        warn "Failed to serialize session data with Marshal: #{e.message}. Session data: #{session_data.inspect}"
      end
      serialized_data = Base64.encode64(Marshal.dump({})) # Clear session on serialization failure
    end

    request = request_for(env)
    cookie_jar = request.cookie_jar

    cookie_jar[@key] = {
      value: serialized_data,
      expires: options[:expires],
      path: options[:path],
      domain: options[:domain],
      secure: options[:secure],
      httponly: options[:httponly],
      same_site: options[:same_site]
    }.compact # Remove nil values before passing to cookie_jar
    true
  end

  def delete_session(env, sid, options)
    request = request_for(env)
    cookie_jar = request.cookie_jar
    cookie_jar.delete(@key, path: options[:path], domain: options[:domain])
    true
  end
end
